name: AZURE_CLIENT_ID
notes: GitHub OIDC client id for UI release and deploy workflows.

name: AZURE_TENANT_ID
notes: Azure tenant id discovered from az account show when available.

name: AZURE_SUBSCRIPTION_ID
notes: Azure subscription id discovered from az account show when available.

name: RESOURCE_GROUP
notes: Shared runtime resource group owned by control-plane provisioning.

name: ACR_PULL_IDENTITY_NAME
notes: User-assigned identity used by the UI Container App to pull from ACR.

name: SERVICE_ACCOUNT_NAME
notes: Shared workload identity or service account name.

name: CONTRACTS_REPOSITORY
notes: Sibling contracts repo slug used by workflows.

name: CONTRACTS_REF
notes: Contracts ref to validate against by default.

name: API_UPSTREAM
notes: Reachable control-plane host used by the UI proxy for /config.js and /api. Store host or host:port only.

name: API_UPSTREAM_SCHEME
notes: Scheme used by the UI proxy when connecting to API_UPSTREAM. Use https for the public ACA FQDN and http only for trusted internal upstreams.

name: UI_AUTH_ENABLED
notes: Boolean runtime toggle for browser authentication and login in the UI container. Production must be true whenever the proxied control-plane config reports authRequired=true.

name: NPMRC
notes: Complete .npmrc content with read access to @asset-allocation/contracts. Store multiline content in .env.web as escaped \n and sync it as the GitHub secret NPMRC.
